error_signature: input data not being received correctly
title: Input data issue with simultaneous workflow execution
symptom: When triggering a workflow multiple times simultaneously via the Execute Workflow node, the input data is not received correctly, resulting in all calls returning the same incorrect value.
not_this_if: Single sequential tool calls are used
Issue does not occur in the latest version
root_cause: The issue arises when multiple workflows are triggered at the same time, causing the input data to be incorrectly handled or overwritten, leading to all executions returning the same result instead of the expected unique inputs.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 1.80.4 or later
Test the workflow again to ensure input data is received correctly
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n to the latest version and retest the simultaneous workflow execution.
